questionHtml: Draw a labelled diagram to show the structure of a single nucleotide of RNA.
markschemeHtml:
1. ribose drawn as a pentagon and labelled;
  2. base linked correctly (to C1) of ribose and labelled;
  3. phosphate linked correctly (to C5) of ribose and labelled;

meta.title: Draw a labelled diagram to show the structure of a single nucleotide of RNA.
